task_updates.executor_notes: Extracted the save/sync lifecycle into `useTimelineSave`, including saveMutation, commit/save pipeline, polling sync, registry sync, save-timer cleanup, and `reloadFromServer`. Moved `shouldAcceptPolledData` and `buildDataFromCurrentRegistry` into `src/tools/video-editor/lib/timeline-save-utils.ts` per DECISION-004, wired save success through `onSaveSuccessRef.current?.()`, and re-exported `SaveStatus` plus `shouldAcceptPolledData`. Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit`; `useTimelineSave.ts` is now 183 LOC.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed. `useTimelineSave` accepts `onSaveSuccessRef`, calls `onSaveSuccessRef.current?.()` from `saveTimeline` success handling instead of touching render state directly, keeps `reloadFromServer` inside the hook, and exports `shouldAcceptPolledData` for downstream re-export/use.
